creator: spam@rm-rf.kiev.ua
text:
On Thu, Feb 09, 2012 at 02:39:17AM +0000, pgollucci@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: [patch] editors/vim remove gettext autodetection, respect WITHOUT_NLS instead
>
> State-Changed-From-To: feedback->open
> State-Changed-By: pgollucci
> State-Changed-When: Thu Feb 9 02:39:17 UTC 2012
> State-Changed-Why:
> submitter timeout (Alex Kozlov <spam@rm-rf.kiev.ua> ; 434 days)
Why this is my timeout?


Last mail in pr:
From:	Alex Kozlov <spam@rm-rf.kiev.ua> [submitter]
To:	David O'Brien <obrien@freebsd.org>, bug-followup@freebsd.org, spam@rm-rf.kiev.ua
Date:	Thu, 2 Dec 2010 12:50:29 +0200

On Mon, Nov 22, 2010 at 11:19:20AM -0800, David O'Brien wrote:
> On Tue, Nov 09, 2010 at 06:49:52AM +0200, Alex Kozlov wrote:
>> On Tue, Nov 09, 2010 at 03:33:01AM +0000, obrien@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> >> This patch doesn't seem to work:
> >> $ make clean
> >> $ make -DWITHOUT_NLS
> >> [..]
> >> $ ldd work/vim73/src/vim | grep libintl.so
> >> libintl.so.9 => /usr/local/lib/libintl.so.9 (0x28f15000)
>> You need to place knob in /etc/make.conf, e.g.
>> $echo WITHOUT_NLS=yes >> /etc/make.conf
> Then I think the patch is wrong.
> I know of no other options that one cannot issue with "-D" on the
> command line. 'make -DWITHOUT_X11' and 'make -DWITH_MOTIF', for
> instance work as expected.
> 
> Do you have other examples of where the knob must be placed in
> /etc/make.conf in order to work?
Sorry for the delay, my dog^W spamfilter ate your last email.
I can't reproduce problem with -DWITHOUT_NLS:

$make -C editors/vim -DWITHOUT_NLS -V MAKE_ARGS
CONF_ARGS="--prefix=/usr/local --with-tlib=termlib " CONF_OPT_FEAT="--with-features=big" CONF_OPT_NLS="--disable-nls" CONF_OPT_GUI="--enable-gui=gtk2 --with-gtk-prefix=/usr/local" CONF_OPT_MULTIBYTE="--enable-multibyte --enable-fontset --enable-xim" X_LIBS=" -lXt"
$make -C editors/vim WITHOUT_NLS=yes -V MAKE_ARGS
CONF_ARGS="--prefix=/usr/local --with-tlib=termlib " CONF_OPT_FEAT="--with-features=big" CONF_OPT_NLS="--disable-nls" CONF_OPT_GUI="--enable-gui=gtk2 --with-gtk-prefix=/usr/local" CONF_OPT_MULTIBYTE="--enable-multibyte --enable-fontset --enable-xim" X_LIBS=" -lXt"

$sudo make -C editors/vim/Makefile -DWITHOUT_NLS
$ldd /usr/obj/var/ports/editors/vim/work/vim73/src/vim
 libm.so.5 => /lib/libm.so.5 (0x481e4000)
 libncurses.so.8 => /lib/libncurses.so.8 (0x481fd000)
 libiconv.so.3 => /usr/local/lib/libiconv.so.3 (0x4823b000)
 libc.so.7 => /lib/libc.so.7 (0x48331000)
[...]


--
Adios
